󠁨󠀺󠁞T󠀉he ⁡︄modern Oly󠀢mpic G󠀾a󠁌mes️,᠎ estab󠀯lishe󠀻d󠁇 in󠀱 ᠎1896󠁴 by󠁅󠁖 󠁂Pierre de Coubertin, were designed to occur every four years.
